reviewDepthApplicability.reason: non-trivial multi-file security review across two repos with subprocess spawning, template rendering, and env forwarding

targetSelection.selectionReason: subprocess spawning, env forwarding, template rendering, and worktree path resolution — all security-relevant surfaces

searchLedger.hypothesis: spawnSync uses shell form enabling injection

searchActions.result: spawnSync('python3', pyArgs, ...) — array form, no shell

searchLedger.rationale: all subprocess calls use array form, no shell injection possible
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct read of spawnSync calls

searchLedger.hypothesis: template rendering injects config values into shell context without escaping

searchActions.result: benchmark_mode_instructions values wrapped in SYS="..." but no escaping of embedded quotes

searchLedger.rationale: config values with shell metacharacters break bash quoting in rendered template

searchLedger.hypothesis: env forwarding leaks secrets to subprocess

searchActions.result: env = { ...process.env } — forwards all env vars including potential API keys

searchLedger.rationale: expected behavior — subprocess needs provider credentials to call model APIs
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: by design: model API credentials must reach the subprocess

searchLedger.hypothesis: make_worktree returns path that could be attacker-controlled

searchActions.result: path constructed from BARTER constant + '.worktrees' + iteration counter — all internal

searchLedger.rationale: path components are all constants or integer iteration counter, no user input
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: no external input in path construction

title: init_packaging.py template rendering lacks context-aware shell escaping

detail: R1-P1-001 confirmed P1: make_worktree returns {base}/Copywriter but deals packaging root is {base}/Barter deals. All callers (guarded_promote, measure, benchmark_one) expect packaging root as CW_ROOT. --run mode completely broken.

R1-P1-002 downgraded P1->P2: readScoreDelta dual-shape is fragile but not currently exploitable. Lane A always produces numeric delta. NaN edge case requires malformed score file no producer generates.

reason: all spawnSync/subprocess.run calls use array form, no shell=true
expected behavior: model API credentials must reach subprocesses
